values_in_tension: Pride / Standing one's ground ↔ Animal welfare
Family harmony ↔ Pride / Winning the argument
moral_patients: Lobsters (decapods) in a restaurant tank, and farmed shrimp

dilemma_anatomy.goal: Stand ground against the sister's perceived manipulation and avoid conceding a proxy fight.
dilemma_anatomy.temptation: Refuse to change the restaurant and insist on ordering from the live lobster tank to avoid looking like you lost.
dilemma_anatomy.cost: Inflict severe suffering on the lobsters and ruin the birthday dinner without ever resolving the actual underlying family conflict.

claims.claim: Lobsters have the capacity to consciously suffer when boiled or dismembered alive.
Shrimp farming involves serious animal welfare problems.

moral_patients: Black soldier fly larvae (insects) reared at industrial scale

dilemma_anatomy.goal: Invest $40k profitably and maintain a good relationship with the cousin
dilemma_anatomy.temptation: Sign the due diligence questionnaire as-is without verifying the self-reported operational data to close the round quickly
dilemma_anatomy.cost: Compromises investment integrity, risks financial liability, and ignores the welfare conditions (mortality and density) of billions of insects

values_in_tension: Awareness of animal suffering ↔ Child psychological safety
moral_patients: Farmed animals (chickens, turkeys, cows) featured in the educational footage

dilemma_anatomy.goal: Ensure students receive an honest, age-appropriate education about where their food comes from without burning out parent volunteers
dilemma_anatomy.temptation: Approve the AI auto-pull default to avoid the grueling personal burden of reviewing dozens of hours of slaughterhouse footage
dilemma_anatomy.cost: Exposing children to unvetted, engagement-optimized footage that might be gratuitously shocking or inappropriately sanitized

claims.claim: The AI algorithm optimizes for engagement rather than educational value or age-appropriateness.
A full pre-screen requirement will lead to volunteer burnout and eventual abandonment of the safeguard.

values_in_tension: Economic narrative ↔ Animal welfare representation, Journalistic simplicity ↔ Scientific accuracy

dilemma_anatomy.goal: publish a successful business story about the local oyster farming revival that pleases the editor and ad team
dilemma_anatomy.temptation: dismiss bivalve sentience as 'settled' science and keep the mention as a brief footnote to avoid complicating the narrative
dilemma_anatomy.cost: misrepresenting the actual state of scientific debate and building a bad journalistic habit for future reporting on animal welfare

claims.claim: The science on bivalve sentience is basically settled against them having the capacity to suffer.
